description_long: This is a single-door wooden filing cabinet with a rectangular shape and a slightly raised back panel. The cabinet features a single round knob handle on the front door, which opens to reveal internal storage space. The exterior is finished in a medium brown wood grain pattern, but is marked with visible patches of dark discoloration and wear, suggesting age or exposure to moisture. The hinges are metal and located on the left side of the door, while the base is slightly recessed, giving the cabinet a sturdy stance. The top surface is flat and can be used to support additional objects, while the overall construction appears solid and functional. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the door.
description: A medium brown, single-door wooden filing cabinet with a round knob handle and visible dark stains, featuring a flat top and sturdy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single door with a round knob handle and some dark stains on the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the metal hinges and more extensive dark discoloration across the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a plain, flat wooden surface with significant dark stains and no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain panel with scattered dark stains and the edge of the front knob just visible.
